items.definition_en: A remote control lets you operate electronic devices from a distance.
items.example_en: He used the remote control to change the TV channel.

items.definition_en: A speaker makes sound from a device louder.
items.example_en: The music played through the speaker.

items.definition_en: A television shows pictures and sounds for people to watch.
items.example_en: She watched a movie on her new television.

items.definition_en: A smartphone is a mobile phone with many functions.
items.example_en: He takes photos with his smartphone.

items.definition_en: A printer makes copies of documents on paper.
items.example_en: The printer is out of ink.

items.definition_en: A tablet is a small flat computer with a touchscreen.
items.example_en: She reads books on her tablet.

items.definition_en: A camera is used to take pictures or videos.
items.example_en: He bought a new camera for his trip.

items.definition_en: A monitor is a screen for a computer.
items.example_en: She replaced her old computer monitor.

items.definition_en: A laptop is a portable computer.
items.example_en: He does his homework on his laptop.

items.definition_en: A battery stores power for electronic devices.
items.example_en: The battery in my phone is low.

items.definition_en: A charger gives power to a device.
items.example_en: She forgot her phone charger at home.

items.definition_en: A power strip lets you plug in several devices at once.
items.example_en: We connected all the computers to a power strip.

items.definition_en: A projector shows images on a wall or screen.
items.example_en: The teacher used a projector for the lesson.

items.definition_en: A game console is used to play video games.
items.example_en: My brother got a new game console.

items.definition_en: A microwave is an electric oven for heating food.
items.example_en: She warmed up soup in the microwave.

items.definition_en: A washing machine is used to wash clothes.
items.example_en: The washing machine is running now.

items.definition_en: A fan moves air to make a room cooler.
items.example_en: They turned on the fan during the hot day.

items.definition_en: A speaker system plays music in a room or house.
items.example_en: The speaker system filled the house with sound.

items.definition_en: A smartwatch is a small computer you wear on your wrist.
items.example_en: She checks her messages on her smartwatch.

items.definition_en: A vacuum cleaner is used to clean floors.
items.example_en: They bought a new vacuum cleaner.
